title: Sheringham and Dudgeon offshore wind farm extension projects: Non-Material Change, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for a non-material change to an offshore wind farm.  Date  6 February 2025  Company / location   Equinor New Energy Ltd 1 Kingdom Street  London  W2 6BD    Type of project / consent requested  Non-material consent under the Planning Act 2008. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
